subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness! The servant in attendance hath read the Book which thou didst send [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی و عنایتی قد حضر العبد الحاضر و قرء الکتاب الذی ارسلته
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @Christ; Christianity, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
